title: (extra) Era do Panado II
description: Expand Era do Panado with Panados and legendary Panado weaponry
body:
# 🍗 Era do Panado II – Extra Content Mod
A companion mod designed specifically for the **Era do Panado II** modpack.

This addon introduces exclusive thematic content to enrich the experience and expand the Panado universe.

---

## ✨ Features

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
- Adds the official *Era do Panado II* logo into the game.
- Delicious (and possibly powerful) new items added to the world.

- A weapon forged from Panado.
- A stronger, upgraded version made with all the legendary panados.
</details>



---

## 📦 Modpack Usage
<details>
<summary>Modpack Usage</summary>
You are free to include this mod in your own modpack.

⚠️ **Important:**  

This mod does **not** automatically configure drop tables or crafting recipes for Panados.  
You will need to manually set up:

- Loot tables  
- Crafting recipes  
- Any additional integrations  
(You can use Datapacks or [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) for this)
</details>
